steps.label: Pick up the rock
steps.flavour: You found a rock half-buried in the mud at the water's edge. It's heavier than it looks.

steps.label: Throw it in the pond
steps.flavour: The rock hit the water. Something down there did not appreciate it.

steps.label: Find what the fish left
steps.flavour: A coin — or something shaped like one. The metal is wrong. But it catches the light perfectly.

steps.label: Throw it into the fog
steps.flavour: The coin disappeared into the dark. Then something moved. You are no longer alone in this part of the forest.

steps.label: Face what appears
steps.flavour: It came out of the fog. Small. Mean-eyed. Absolutely certain it can take you.

steps.label: Survive
steps.flavour: You stood your ground. It didn't. Whatever comes next, you've earned it.
